title: Reduce monster defense by 80% to fix combat balance

requirements.summary: Reduce all monster defense/armor values by 80% in the combat engine to ensure a player with 9 strength deals meaningful damage to level 1 enemies
acceptanceCriteria: Monster defense/armor values in monsters.ts (base templates and prefix/suffix modifiers) are reduced by 80%
The combat engine damage calculation in combatEngine.ts reflects reduced monster defense
A player with 9 strength deals more than 1 damage per hit against a level 1 enemy
No other monster stats (HP, attack, speed) are changed

file_operations.description: Reduce all defense/armor values in base monster templates by 80%. For each monster template in the baseMonsters array, multiply the defense stat by 0.2 (keeping 20% of the original value). Also reduce defense modifiers in prefix and suffix pools by 80% - multiply all defense bonuses by 0.2. Leave HP, attack, attackSpeed, and all non-defense stats unchanged.

Verify that the damage calculation in the combat engine correctly applies the reduced monster defense values when computing damage dealt to monsters. Ensure the damage formula uses the monster's defense stat (which will now be 80% lower) to calculate final damage. The expected behavior is that a player with 9 strength should now deal significantly more than 1 damage per hit to level 1 enemies. No changes to the damage formula itself are needed - this operation is to confirm the existing formula will work correctly with the reduced defense values from monsters.ts.
